headline: Firefly Aerospace Successfully Launches Alpha Flight 7
summary: Stairway to Seven mission tested and validated key Alpha Block II upgrades ahead of Flight 8 LOMPOC, Calif., March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Firefly Aerospace (Nasdaq: FLY), a market leading space and defense technology company, today announced the successful launch of its Alpha Flight 7 Stairway to Seven mission. headline: Lockheed Martin vs. L3Harris: Which Defense Giant Belongs in Your Portfolio?
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) and L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) both reported Q4 2025 earnings on January 29, 2026. One is the largest defense prime contractor on earth, building jets and missiles at scale. The other is the electronics and communications backbone that makes those weapons systems work. headline: Rivian to unveil new SUV, Firefly launches space mission
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre and Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Rivian (RIVN) will be unveiling a new midsize SUV. UiPath (PATH) stock is falling on the company's weaker-than-expected full-year revenue growth forecast. Firefly Aerospace (FLY) stock is surging after the company successfully launched its Alpha Flight 7 space mission. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: Energy ETF extends record run, Firefly Aerospace's successful launch
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. US stocks move lower as oil prices rise, with conflict in the Middle East spooking investors. The State Street Energy Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLE) continues a 2-day streak after hitting its 15th intraday record high of 2026. Firefly Aerospace (FLY) surges after the successful launch of a payload for Lockheed Martin (LMT). Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
